text.title: Experimentation at Scale Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying experimentation at scale end-to-end.

step.name: triage-idea
step.action: Run triage script (haiku) ranking by EV/effort; dedup against archive.
step.decision-gate: If <2 ranked candidates, return to discovery — do not force experiments.

step.name: author-hypothesis
step.action: Author hypothesis doc with primary, secondary, >=3 guardrails, MDE, runtime; PM signs.
step.decision-gate: If MDE/runtime infeasible at current traffic, defer or split — do not launch under-powered.

step.name: launch
step.action: Launch on platform; verify bucketing health; subscribe guardrail alerts.

step.name: readout
step.action: Run SRM check; compute primary + secondary + guardrails; author readout markdown with binary decision (ship/kill/iterate).
step.decision-gate: If SRM fails, block readout and debug bucketing.

step.name: archive
step.action: Validate experiment record; commit to archive with searchable tags (hypothesis area, decision); update agent's dedup index.
